Package com.audiodo.aspen

Class EqualizerConfiguration

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.audiodo.aspen.EqualizerConfiguration
  • public class EqualizerConfiguration
extends java.lang.Object
    Represents a configuration for an equalizer.

    The configuration contains 9 gains for different frequency bands. The gains are in centibels
    with a range of -120 to 120

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      protected boolean swigCMemOwn  

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Modifier Constructor Description
        EqualizerConfiguration()
      Construct a new default Equalizer Configuration object.

      The default configuration sets all gains to zero.

      • EqualizerConfiguration

        public EqualizerConfiguration()
        Construct a new default Equalizer Configuration object.

        The default configuration sets all gains to zero.

      • EqualizerConfiguration

        public EqualizerConfiguration​(byte gain_63Hz,
                              byte gain_125Hz,
                              byte gain_250Hz,
                              byte gain_500Hz,
                              byte gain_1000Hz,
                              byte gain_2000Hz,
                              byte gain_4000Hz,
                              byte gain_8000Hz,
                              byte gain_16000Hz)
        Construct a new Equalizer Configuration object with data.

        Parameters:
        gain_63Hz - The gain for the frequency 63Hz.
        gain_125Hz - The gain for the frequency 125Hz.
        gain_250Hz - The gain for the frequency 250Hz.
        gain_500Hz - The gain for the frequency 500Hz.
        gain_1000Hz - The gain for the frequency 1000Hz.
        gain_2000Hz - The gain for the frequency 2000Hz.
        gain_4000Hz - The gain for the frequency 4000Hz.
        gain_8000Hz - The gain for the frequency 8000Hz.
        gain_16000Hz - The gain for the frequency 16000Hz.
